verses.latin_vulgate: Canticum graduum.   Lætatus sum in his quæ dicta sunt mihi :  In domum Domini ibimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֥יר הַֽמַּעֲל֗וֹת לְדָ֫וִ֥ד שָׂ֭מַחְתִּי בְּאֹמְרִ֣ים לִ֑י בֵּ֖ית יְהֹוָ֣ה נֵלֵֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: I was glad when they said unto me, Let us go into the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Stantes erant pedes nostri  in atriis tuis, Jerusalem.
verses.king_james: Our feet shall stand within thy gates, O Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jerusalem, quæ ædificatur ut civitas,  cujus participatio ejus in idipsum.
verses.king_james: Jerusalem is builded as a city that is compact together:

verses.latin_vulgate: Illuc enim ascenderunt tribus, tribus Domini :  testimonium Israël,  ad confitendum nomini Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֶׁשָּׁ֨ם עָל֪וּ שְׁבָטִ֡ים שִׁבְטֵי־יָ֭הּ עֵד֣וּת לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל לְ֝הֹד֗וֹת לְשֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Whither the tribes go up, the tribes of the Lord, unto the testimony of Israel, to give thanks unto the name of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia illic sederunt sedes in judicio,  sedes super domum David.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י שָׁ֨מָּה ׀ יָשְׁב֣וּ כִסְא֣וֹת לְמִשְׁפָּ֑ט כִּ֝סְא֗וֹת לְבֵ֣ית דָּוִֽד׃
verses.king_james: For there are set thrones of judgment, the thrones of the house of David.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rogate quæ ad pacem sunt Jerusalem,  et abundantia diligentibus te.
verses.king_james: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: they shall prosper that love thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiat pax in virtute tua,  et abundantia in turribus tuis.
verses.king_james: Peace be within thy walls, and prosperity within thy palaces.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter fratres meos et proximos meos,  loquebar pacem de te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭מַעַן אַחַ֣י וְרֵעָ֑י אֲדַבְּרָה־נָּ֖א שָׁל֣וֹם בָּֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: For my brethren and companions’ sakes, I will now say, Peace be within thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter domum Domini Dei nostri,  quæsivi bona tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭מַעַן בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ אֲבַקְשָׁ֖ה ט֣וֹב לָֽךְ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Because of the house of the Lord our God I will seek thy good.
